name: Progress Invoice
html:
Progress Invoice
{{ doc.name }}

{%- set pb = frappe.db.get_value("Progress Billing Log", {"sales_invoice": doc.name}, ["progress_no", "billing_percentage", "billing_amount", "total_billed_amount", "remaining_amount"], as_dict=True) or {} -%} {%- if doc.pb_against_sales_order -%} {%- endif -%} {%- if pb.progress_no -%} {%- endif -%}
Customer{{ doc.customer_name or doc.customer }}
Posting Date{{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.posting_date) }}
Against Sales Order{{ doc.pb_against_sales_order }}
Progress No.{{ pb.progress_no }}
{%- for item in doc.items -%} {%- endfor -%}
No. Item Qty Rate Amount
{{ loop.index }} {{ item.item_name or item.item_code }} {{ item.get_formatted("qty", doc) }} {{ item.get_formatted("rate", doc) }} {{ item.get_formatted("amount", doc) }}
{%- if doc.rounded_total and doc.rounded_total != doc.grand_total -%} {%- endif -%}
Grand Total{{ doc.get_formatted("grand_total") }}
Rounded Total{{ doc.get_formatted("rounded_total") }}
In Words{{ doc.in_words }}
{%- if pb -%} {%- set previously_billed = (pb.total_billed_amount or 0) - (pb.billing_amount or 0) -%}

Progress Billing Status

{%- if doc.pb_against_sales_order -%} {%- set contract_value = frappe.db.get_value("Sales Order", doc.pb_against_sales_order, "grand_total") -%} {%- endif -%}
Contract Value{{ doc.currency }} {{ "%.2f"|format(contract_value or 0) }}
Previously Billed{{ doc.currency }} {{ "%.2f"|format(previously_billed) }}
This Invoice ({{ "%.2f"|format(pb.billing_percentage or 0) }}%){{ doc.currency }} {{ "%.2f"|format(pb.billing_amount or 0) }}
Total Billed to Date{{ doc.currency }} {{ "%.2f"|format(pb.total_billed_amount or 0) }}
Remaining Amount{{ doc.currency }} {{ "%.2f"|format(pb.remaining_amount or 0) }}
{%- endif -%}
